steps.name: Given I am on the HOME page
When I clock in the timesheet with PIN "1314"
Click locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title').filter({ hasText: 'PASSWORD' }) }).getByText('1', { exact: true })
Click locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title').filter({ hasText: 'PASSWORD' }) }).getByText('3', { exact: true })
Click locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title').filter({ hasText: 'PASSWORD' }) }).getByText('1', { exact: true })
Click locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title').filter({ hasText: 'PASSWORD' }) }).getByText('4', { exact: true })
Click locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title') }).locator('div.MuiDialogActions-root').getByRole('button', { name: 'CONFIRM', exact: true })
Then I should see the employee "Jazzie" in the employee list
Then I should see the "Ticket View" screen
And I should see the "Manicure" service
When I add the "Manicure" service to my cart
And I select the "GIFT CARD" category
And I add the "Shampoo" service to my cart
And I add the "Gift card $100" service to my cart
Then I should see a popup dialog with title "Activate Gift Card $100.00"
And I click on the "OK" button in the popup dialog
Then I should see the number card "2222" visible
When I click on the "ADD ON" button in the popup dialog
Then I should see the service "Gift card $100 (2222)" in my cart
And I should see my cart showing 3 item added
When I click on the total price of "Manicure"
When I click on the "PAY" button
Then I should see the text "PAYMENT TICKET" visible
And I click on the element with id "payment"
And I select the "Credit" payment type
And I fill the last 4 digits of card number "1234"
And I click on the element with id "payment"
Then I should be redirected to HOME page
When I clock out the timesheet with PIN "1314"
Click locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title').filter({ hasText: 'PASSWORD' }) }).getByText('1', { exact: true })
Click locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title').filter({ hasText: 'PASSWORD' }) }).getByText('3', { exact: true })
Click locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title').filter({ hasText: 'PASSWORD' }) }).getByText('1', { exact: true })
Click locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title').filter({ hasText: 'PASSWORD' }) }).getByText('4', { exact: true })
Click locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title') }).locator('div.MuiDialogActions-root').getByRole('button', { name: 'CONFIRM', exact: true })
Then I should not see the employee "Jazzie" in the employee list
Given I am on the PAYROLL page
Then I should see the "Payroll" screen
When I wait for the page fully loaded
And I wait for the page fully loaded
And I select the type "Employee View"
Then I should see the Payroll Date default to today
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('table tbody tr').filter({ hasText: 'Payroll Date' }).locator('td').nth(1)
And I should see the detail "Technician Jazzie" in the employee view
And I should see the detail "Payroll Type Hourly" in the employee view
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('div.MuiBox-root').locator('table tbody tr').filter({ hasText: 'Payroll Type' }).first()
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('div.MuiBox-root').locator('table tbody tr').filter({ hasText: 'Payroll Type' }).first().locator('td').nth(1)
Expect "toContainText" locator('div.MuiBox-root').locator('table tbody tr').filter({ hasText: 'Payroll Type' }).first().locator('td').nth(1)
And I should see the detail "# of Work Days 1" in the employee view
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('div.MuiBox-root').locator('table tbody tr').filter({ hasText: '# of Work Days' }).first()
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('div.MuiBox-root').locator('table tbody tr').filter({ hasText: '# of Work Days' }).first().locator('td').nth(1)
Expect "toContainText" locator('div.MuiBox-root').locator('table tbody tr').filter({ hasText: '# of Work Days' }).first().locator('td').nth(1)
And I should see the detail "Product Commission $5.00" in the employee view
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('div.MuiBox-root').locator('table tbody tr').filter({ hasText: 'Product Commission' }).first()
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('div.MuiBox-root').locator('table tbody tr').filter({ hasText: 'Product Commission' }).first().locator('td').nth(1)
Expect "toContainText" locator('div.MuiBox-root').locator('table tbody tr').filter({ hasText: 'Product Commission' }).first().locator('td').nth(1)
And I should see the detail "Non-Cash Tips $9.75" in the employee view
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('div.MuiBox-root').locator('table tbody tr').filter({ hasText: 'Non-Cash Tips' }).first()
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('div.MuiBox-root').locator('table tbody tr').filter({ hasText: 'Non-Cash Tips' }).first().locator('td').nth(1)
Expect "toContainText" locator('div.MuiBox-root').locator('table tbody tr').filter({ hasText: 'Non-Cash Tips' }).first().locator('td').nth(1)
And I should see the detail "Total Hourly Pay $0.00" in the employee view
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('div.MuiBox-root').locator('table tbody tr').filter({ hasText: 'Total Hourly Pay' }).first()
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('div.MuiBox-root').locator('table tbody tr').filter({ hasText: 'Total Hourly Pay' }).first().locator('td').nth(1)
Expect "toContainText" locator('div.MuiBox-root').locator('table tbody tr').filter({ hasText: 'Total Hourly Pay' }).first().locator('td').nth(1)
And I should see the detail "Total Pay $14.75" in the employee view
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('div.MuiBox-root').locator('table tbody tr').filter({ hasText: 'Total Pay' }).first()
Expect "toBeVisible" locator('div.MuiBox-root').locator('table tbody tr').filter({ hasText: 'Total Pay' }).first().locator('td').nth(1)
Expect "toContainText" locator('div.MuiBox-root').locator('table tbody tr').filter({ hasText: 'Total Pay' }).first().locator('td').nth(1)
And I should see the detail "Pay 1 $12.75" in the employee view
And I should see the detail "Pay 2 $2.00" in the employee view
And I should see the text "Daily Details" in the employee view
And I should see the Reg Pay, NC Tip, Commission as "$0.00 $9.75 $5.00" in employee view
Given I am on the CLOSED_TICKETS page
And I wait for the page fully loaded
Then I should see the first ticket of payment "$218.97"
